modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern dark fantasy can begin with an app, train, game, or artifact, but it must become cost, grief, land, oath, wound, and survival.

catalyst.logline: A hidden app opens after the last train misses its stop, and the platform map redraws into a grave-road where every notification is a name owed to the dead.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=ja_JP; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'cursed_app_at_last_train': A hidden app opens after the last train misses its stop, and the platform map redraws into a grave-road where every notification is a name owed to the dead. Transmutation: App interface becomes oath ledger. Market surface: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette. Audience rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
